attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 SDCD.CLAIM_ID                      
, SDCD.CLAIM_DETAIL_ID               
, SDCD.POS_TRANS_ID                  
, SDCD.POS_TRANS_TYPE                
, SDCD.PROMO_NUMBER                  
, SDCD.MFG_PART_NUM                  
, SDCD.VENDOR_PART_NUM               
, SDCD.REPORTED_ELIGIBLE_QTY         
, SDCD.ELIGIBLE_QTY                  
, SDCD.TOTAL_REPORTED_QTY            
, SDCD.REPORTED_WPL_PRICE            
, SDCD.WPL_PRICE                     
, SDCD.EXTENDED_WPL_PRICE            
, SDCD.REPORTED_GPL_PRICE            
, SDCD.GPL_PRICE                     
, SDCD.EXTENDED_GPL_PRICE            
, SDCD.OLD_PRICE                     
, SDCD.NEW_PRICE                     
, SDCD.REPORTED_UNIT_REBATE          
, SDCD.REPORTED_EXTENDED_REBATE      
, SDCD.ELIGIBLE_UNIT_REBATE          
, SDCD.ELIGIBLE_EXTENDED_REBATE      
, SDCD.PRICE_CHANGE_DATE             
, SDCD.DATE_OF_SUBMISSION            
, SDCD.RESELLER_NAME                 
, SDCD.RESELLER_COUNTRY_CODE         
, SDCD.RESELLER_ADDRESS1             
, SDCD.RESELLER_ADDRESS2             
, SDCD.RESELLER_CITY                 
, SDCD.RESELLER_STATE                
, SDCD.RESELLER_ZIP_CODE             
, SDCD.RESELLER_PHONE                
, SDCD.RESELLER_ACCOUNT_NO           
, SDCD.RESELLER_CERTIFIED            
, SDCD.RESELLER_CERTIFICATION_LEVEL  
, SDCD.ENDUSER_NAME                  
, SDCD.ENDUSER_COUNTRY_CODE          
, SDCD.ENDUSER_ADDRESS1              
, SDCD.ENDUSER_ADDRESS2              
, SDCD.ENDUSER_CITY                  
, SDCD.ENDUSER_STATE                 
, SDCD.ENDUSER_ZIP_CODE              
, SDCD.ENDUSER_PHONE                 
, SDCD.INVOICE_NUMBER                
, SDCD.PO_NUMBER                     
, SDCD.TRADEIN_QUOTE_NUMBER          
, SDCD.DISTI_DEBIT_MEMO_NUMBER       
, SDCD.MARKET_TYPE                   
, SDCD.VALIDATION_REASON_CODE        
, SDCD.CORRECTION_ACTION             
, SDCD.COMMENTS                      
, SDCD.CLAIM_DETAIL_STATUS           
, SDCD.ACTIVE_FLAG                   
, SDCD.CREATED_BY                    
, SDCD.CREATED_DATE                  
, SDCD.UPDATED_BY                    
, SDCD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
, SDCD.REPORTED_UNIT_REBATE_LC       
, SDCD.REPORTED_EXTENDED_REBATE_LC   
, SDCD.ELIGIBLE_UNIT_REBATE_LC       
, SDCD.ELIGIBLE_EXTENDED_REBATE_LC   
, SDCD.WPL_PRICE_LC                  
, SDCD.GPL_PRICE_LC                  
, SDCD.DCA_CONVERSION_RATE           
, SDCD.OLD_PRICE_LC                  
, SDCD.NEW_PRICE_LC                  
, SDCD.DERIVED_PART_NUMBER           
, SDCD.GST_AMOUNT                    
, SDCD.GST_AMOUNT_LC                 
, SDCD.MEMO_CREATED_DATE             
, SDCD.REVISION_NUMBER               
, SDCD.ATTRIBUTE1                    
, SDCD.MEMO_NUMBER                   
, SDCD.MEMO_AMT                      
, SDCD.ELIGIBLE_VARIANCE_UNIT_REBATE 
, SDCD.SRC_VARIANCE                      
, SDCD.SHORT_PAY_REASON              
, SDCD.BATCH_ID                      
, SDCD.ACTION_CD                     
, SDCD.CREATE_DATETIME  
,'N' AS LOG_SOURCE_FLG
,SDCD.EXTERNAL_REF_ID
,SDCD.DATE_OF_SALE
,SDCD.DERIVED_PART_NUM DERIVED_PART_NUM
,SDCD.GL_ACCOUNT_NO  
,SDCD.SAVE_FORCE_TEXT
,SDCD.POS_PDB_BE_ID /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
,SDCD.POS_PDB_BEGEO_ID /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
,SDCD.PROMO_PDB_BE_ID /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
,SDCD.PROMO_PDB_BEGEO_ID /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
FROM $$STGDB.ST_DCA_CLAIM_DETAILS SDCD

UNION ALL

SELECT 
 SDCDL.CLAIM_ID                      
, SDCDL.CLAIM_DETAIL_ID               
, SDCDL.POS_TRANS_ID                  
, SDCDL.POS_TRANS_TYPE                
, SDCDL.PROMO_NUMBER                  
, SDCDL.MFG_PART_NUM                  
, SDCDL.VENDOR_PART_NUM               
, SDCDL.REPORTED_ELIGIBLE_QTY         
, SDCDL.ELIGIBLE_QTY                  
, SDCDL.TOTAL_REPORTED_QTY            
, SDCDL.REPORTED_WPL_PRICE            
, SDCDL.WPL_PRICE                     
, SDCDL.EXTENDED_WPL_PRICE            
, SDCDL.REPORTED_GPL_PRICE            
, SDCDL.GPL_PRICE                     
, SDCDL.EXTENDED_GPL_PRICE            
, SDCDL.OLD_PRICE                     
, SDCDL.NEW_PRICE                     
, SDCDL.REPORTED_UNIT_REBATE          
, SDCDL.REPORTED_EXTENDED_REBATE      
, SDCDL.ELIGIBLE_UNIT_REBATE          
, SDCDL.ELIGIBLE_EXTENDED_REBATE      
, SDCDL.PRICE_CHANGE_DATE             
, SDCDL.DATE_OF_SUBMISSION            
, SDCDL.RESELLER_NAME                 
, SDCDL.RESELLER_COUNTRY_CODE         
, SDCDL.RESELLER_ADDRESS1             
, SDCDL.RESELLER_ADDRESS2             
, SDCDL.RESELLER_CITY                 
, SDCDL.RESELLER_STATE                
, SDCDL.RESELLER_ZIP_CODE

, SDCDL.RESELLER_ACCOUNT_NO           
, SDCDL.RESELLER_CERTIFIED            
, SDCDL.RESELLER_CERTIFICATION_LEVEL  
, SDCDL.ENDUSER_NAME                  
, SDCDL.ENDUSER_COUNTRY_CODE          
, SDCDL.ENDUSER_ADDRESS1              
, SDCDL.ENDUSER_ADDRESS2              
, SDCDL.ENDUSER_CITY                  
, SDCDL.ENDUSER_STATE                 
, SDCDL.ENDUSER_ZIP_CODE              
, SDCDL.ENDUSER_PHONE                 
, SDCDL.INVOICE_NUMBER                
, SDCDL.PO_NUMBER                     
, SDCDL.TRADEIN_QUOTE_NUMBER          
, SDCDL.DISTI_DEBIT_MEMO_NUMBER       
, SDCDL.MARKET_TYPE                   
, SDCDL.VALIDATION_REASON_CODE        
, SDCDL.CORRECTION_ACTION             
, SDCDL.COMMENTS                      
, SDCDL.CLAIM_DETAIL_STATUS           
, SDCDL.ACTIVE_FLAG                   
, SDCDL.CREATED_BY                    
, SDCDL.CREATED_DATE                  
, SDCDL.UPDATED_BY                    
, SDCDL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
, SDCDL.REPORTED_UNIT_REBATE_LC       
, SDCDL.REPORTED_EXTENDED_REBATE_LC   
, SDCDL.ELIGIBLE_UNIT_REBATE_LC       
, SDCDL.ELIGIBLE_EXTENDED_REBATE_LC   
, SDCDL.WPL_PRICE_LC                  
, SDCDL.GPL_PRICE_LC                  
, SDCDL.DCA_CONVERSION_RATE           
, SDCDL.OLD_PRICE_LC                  
, SDCDL.NEW_PRICE_LC                  
, SDCDL.DERIVED_PART_NUMBER           
, SDCDL.GST_AMOUNT                    
, SDCDL.GST_AMOUNT_LC                 
, SDCDL.MEMO_CREATED_DATE             
, SDCDL.REVISION_NUMBER               
, SDCDL.ATTRIBUTE1                    
, SDCDL.MEMO_NUMBER                   
, SDCDL.MEMO_AMT                      
, SDCDL.ELIGIBLE_VARIANCE_UNIT_REBATE 
, SDCDL.SRC_VARIANCE                      
, SDCDL.SHORT_PAY_REASON              
, SDCDL.BATCH_ID                      
, SDCDL.ACTION_CODE                     
, SDCDL.CREATE_DATETIME  
,'Y' AS LOG_SOURCE_FLG
,SDCDL.EXTERNAL_REF_ID
,SDCDL.DATE_OF_SALE
,SDCDL.DERIVED_PART_NUMBER DERIVED_PART_NUM
,SDCDL.GL_ACCOUNT_NO  /* ADDED AS PART OF March2014 Release */
,SDCDL.SAVE_FORCE_TEXT  /* ADDED AS PART OF March2014 Release */
,SDCDL.POS_PDB_BE_ID /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
,SDCDL.POS_PDB_BEGEO_ID /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
,SDCDL.PROMO_PDB_BE_ID /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
,SDCDL.PROMO_PDB_BEGEO_ID /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
FROM $$STGDB.ST_DCA_CLAIM_DETAILS_LOG SDCDL

SELECT 
SDCD.CLAIM_DETAIL_ID		AS BK_CLAIM_DETAIL_ID_INT ,
SDCD.DERIVED_PART_NUMBER	AS REPORTED_PART_NUM,
CASE 
	WHEN SDCD.POS_TRANS_TYPE='POS' THEN SDCD.POS_TRANS_ID
	ELSE NULL 
END							AS RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
SDCD.MEMO_NUMBER			AS MEMO_NUM,
SDCD.MEMO_CREATED_DATE		AS AR_TRANSACTION_DTM,
SDCD.GST_AMOUNT				AS GLOBAL_SALES_TAX_USD_AMT,
SDCD.GST_AMOUNT_LC			AS GLOBAL_SALES_TAX_LOCAL_AMT,
CASE 
	WHEN SDCD.POS_TRANS_TYPE='INV' THEN SDCD.POS_TRANS_ID
	ELSE NULL 
END							AS RU_DISTI_INV_TRX_ID_INT,
SDCD.DCA_CONVERSION_RATE	AS SRC_RPTD_CURR_CONV_RT,
SDCD.REPORTED_UNIT_REBATE_LC		AS RPTD_UNIT_REBATE_LOCAL_AMT,
SDCD.REPORTED_EXTENDED_REBATE_LC	AS RPTD_EXTENDED_REBATE_LOCAL_AMT,
SDCD.ELIGIBLE_UNIT_REBATE_LC		AS ELIG_UNIT_REBATE_LOCAL_AMT,
SDCD.ELIGIBLE_EXTENDED_REBATE_LC	AS ELIG_EXTENDED_REBATE_LOCAL_AMT,
SDCD.SRC_VARIANCE				AS VARIANCE_LIMIT_PERCENT, 
SDCD.ELIGIBLE_VARIANCE_UNIT_REBATE	AS ELIG_VRNCE_UNIT_REBATE_USD_AMT,
SDCD.CREATED_DATE			AS SOURCE_CREATED_DTM ,
SDCD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE		AS SOURCE_LAST_UPDATED_DTM,
SDCD.UPDATED_BY				AS UPDATED_BY_AS_REPORTED_USER,
SDCD.CREATED_BY				AS CREATED_BY_AS_REPORTED_USER,
SDCD.COMMENTS				AS DISTI_REPORTED_COMMENTS,
SDCD.CLAIM_DETAIL_STATUS	AS CLAIM_DETAIL_STATUS_CD,
SDCD.DATE_OF_SUBMISSION		AS CLAIM_DETAIL_CREATED_DTM,
SDCD.ELIGIBLE_UNIT_REBATE	AS ELIGIBLE_UNIT_REBATE_USD_AMT,
SDCD.ELIGIBLE_EXTENDED_REBATE		AS ELIG_EXTENDED_REBATE_USD_AMT,
SDCD.REPORTED_UNIT_REBATE	AS RPTD_UNIT_REBATE_USD_AMT ,
SDCD.REPORTED_EXTENDED_REBATE		AS RPTD_EXTENDED_REBATE_USD_AMT,
SDCD.ELIGIBLE_QTY			AS ELIGIBLE_QTY,
SDCD.REPORTED_ELIGIBLE_QTY	AS DISTI_RPTD_ELIGIBLE_QTY ,
SDCD.TRADEIN_QUOTE_NUMBER	AS DISTI_RPTD_TRADE_IN_NUM ,
SDCD.DISTI_DEBIT_MEMO_NUMBER		AS DISTRI_RPTD_DEBIT_MEMO_NUM,
SDCD.POS_TRANS_TYPE			AS POS_TRANSACTION_TYPE,
SDCD.MEMO_AMT				AS AR_TRANSACTION_ALLOCATED_AMT,
SDCD.ATTRIBUTE1				AS RESELLER_VALIDATION_CD,
SDCD.CLAIM_ID				AS BK_CLAIM_ID_INT,
CASE
	WHEN SDCD.ACTIVE_FLAG='Y' THEN 'N'
	WHEN SDCD.ACTIVE_FLAG='N' THEN 'Y'
END 						AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLAG,
SDCD.PROMO_NUMBER			AS DISTI_PROMOTION_NUM,
SDCD.REVISION_NUMBER        AS DISTI_PROMOTION_REV_NUM_INT,
NDC.BK_PROMOTION_TYPE_CD	AS DISTI_PROMOTION_TYPE_CD,
NP_MFG.ITEM_KEY				AS PRODUCT_KEY,
NP_DRVD.ITEM_KEY			AS VALIDATED_PROMO_PRODUCT_KEY,
NCWP_CRTD.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY	AS CRTD_BY_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
NCWP_UPDT.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY	AS UPD_BY_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
SDCD.ENDUSER_NAME			AS REPORTED_END_USER_NAME,
SDCD.ENDUSER_COUNTRY_CODE	AS REPORTED_END_USER_COUNTRY_CD,
SDCD.ENDUSER_ADDRESS1		AS REPORTED_END_USER_LINE_1_ADDR,
SDCD.ENDUSER_ADDRESS2		AS REPORTED_END_USER_LINE_2_ADDR,
SDCD.ENDUSER_CITY			AS REPORTED_END_USER_CITY_NAME,
SDCD.ENDUSER_STATE			AS REPORTED_END_USER_STATE_NAME,
SDCD.ENDUSER_ZIP_CODE		AS REPORTED_END_USER_ZIP_CD,
SDCD.ENDUSER_PHONE			AS REPORTED_END_USER_PHONE_NUM,
SDCD.RESELLER_NAME			AS REPORTED_RESELLER_NAME,
SDCD.RESELLER_COUNTRY_CODE	AS REPORTED_RESELLER_COUNTRY_CD,
SDCD.RESELLER_ADDRESS1		AS REPORTED_RESELLER_LINE_1_ADDR,
SDCD.RESELLER_ADDRESS2		AS REPORTED_RESELLER_LINE_2_ADDR,
SDCD.RESELLER_CITY			AS REPORTED_RESELLER_CITY_NAME,
SDCD.RESELLER_STATE			AS REPORTED_RESELLER_STATE_NAME,
SDCD.RESELLER_ZIP_CODE		AS REPORTED_RESELLER_ZIP_CD,
SDCD.RESELLER_PHONE			AS REPORTED_RESELLER_PHONE_NUM,
SDCD.WPL_PRICE_LC			AS RU_WPL_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
SDCD.GPL_PRICE_LC			AS RU_GPL_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
SDCD.REPORTED_WPL_PRICE		AS RU_RPTD_WPL_PRICE_USD_AMT,
SDCD.WPL_PRICE				AS RU_WPL_PRICE_USD_AMT,
SDCD.EXTENDED_WPL_PRICE		AS RU_EXTENDED_WPL_PRICE_USD_AMT,
SDCD.REPORTED_GPL_PRICE		AS RU_RPTD_GPL_PRICE_USD_AMT,
SDCD.GPL_PRICE				AS RU_GPL_PRICE_USD_AMT,
SDCD.EXTENDED_GPL_PRICE		AS RU_EXTENDED_GPL_PRICE_USD_AMT,
SDCD.TOTAL_REPORTED_QTY		AS RU_TOTAL_REPORTED_QTY,
SDCD.VENDOR_PART_NUM		AS RU_DISTRIBUTOR_PART_NUM,
SDCD.MARKET_TYPE			AS RU_RPTD_MARKET_TYPE_CD,
SDCD.INVOICE_NUMBER			AS RU_RPTD_DISTI_INVOICE_NUM,
SDCD.PO_NUMBER				AS RU_RPTD_RESLLR_TO_DISTI_PO_NUM,
SDCD.RESELLER_ACCOUNT_NO	AS RU_RPTD_RESELLER_ACCOUNT_NUM,
CASE 
	WHEN  SDCD.RESELLER_CERTIFIED ='YES' THEN 'Y'  
	WHEN  SDCD.RESELLER_CERTIFIED ='NO' THEN 'N'
	WHEN  SDCD.RESELLER_CERTIFIED IS NULL THEN '=' 
	WHEN  SDCD.RESELLER_CERTIFIED ='0' THEN '='
	ELSE  SDCD.RESELLER_CERTIFIED 
END 						AS RU_RPTD_RESELLER_CERTIFIED_FLG,
SDCD.RESELLER_CERTIFICATION_LEVEL	AS RU_RPTD_RESELLER_CRTFCTN_CD,
SDCD.OLD_PRICE_LC			AS RU_DISTI_RPTD_OLD_PRC_LCL_AMT,
SDCD.NEW_PRICE_LC			AS RU_DISTI_RPTD_NEW_PRC_LCL_AMT,
SDCD.OLD_PRICE				AS RU_DISTI_RPTD_OLD_PRC_USD_AMT,
SDCD.NEW_PRICE				AS RU_DISTI_RPTD_NEW_PRC_USD_AMT,
SDCD.PRICE_CHANGE_DATE		AS RU_DISTI_RPTD_PRC_CHANGE_DT,
SDCD.VALIDATION_REASON_CODE	AS CLAIM_REJECTION_REASON_CD,
SDCD.CORRECTION_ACTION		AS CLAIM_CORRECTION_ACTION_CD,
SDCD.SHORT_PAY_REASON		AS SHORT_PAY_REASON_CD,
SDCD.LOG_SOURCE_FLG,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)		AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER						AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)		AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER						AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
SDCD.EXTERNAL_REF_ID,
SDCD.DERIVED_PART_NUM,
SDCD.DATE_OF_SALE,
SDCD.GL_ACCOUNT_NO AS FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,  /* ADDED AS PART OF March2014 Release */
SDCD.SAVE_FORCE_TEXT AS SAVE_FORCE_RSN_TXT,   /* ADDED AS PART OF March2014 Release */
SDCD.POS_PDB_BE_ID AS RPTD_POS_BE_ID_INT, /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
SDCD.POS_PDB_BEGEO_ID AS RPTD_POS_BE_GEO_ID_INT, /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
SDCD.PROMO_PDB_BE_ID AS RPTD_PROMOTION_BE_ID_INT, /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
SDCD.PROMO_PDB_BEGEO_ID AS RPTD_PROMOTION_BE_GEO_ID_INT /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */

FROM $$STGDB.ST_DCA_CLAIM_DETAILS_INT SDCD

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DISTRIBUTOR_CLAIM NDC
ON NDC.BK_CLAIM_ID_INT=SDCD.CLAIM_ID    

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP_MFG
ON SDCD.MFG_PART_NUM=NP_MFG.BK_PRODUCT_ID

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT  NP_DRVD
ON SDCD.DERIVED_PART_NUMBER=NP_DRVD.BK_PRODUCT_ID

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_CRTD
ON SDCD.CREATED_BY = NCWP_CRTD.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_UPDT
ON SDCD.UPDATED_BY = NCWP_UPDT.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS

WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_DCA_CLAIM_DETAILS EDCD
WHERE SDCD.CLAIM_ID=EDCD.CLAIM_ID
AND SDCD.CLAIM_DETAIL_ID=EDCD.CLAIM_DETAIL_ID
AND EDCD.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI' )

SELECT 
EDCD.CLAIM_ID,
EDCD.CLAIM_DETAIL_ID,
EDCD.POS_TRANS_ID,
EDCD.POS_TRANS_TYPE,
EDCD.PROMO_NUMBER,
EDCD.MFG_PART_NUM,
EDCD.VENDOR_PART_NUM,
EDCD.REPORTED_ELIGIBLE_QTY,
EDCD.ELIGIBLE_QTY,
EDCD.TOTAL_REPORTED_QTY,
EDCD.REPORTED_WPL_PRICE,
EDCD.WPL_PRICE,
EDCD.EXTENDED_WPL_PRICE,
EDCD.REPORTED_GPL_PRICE,
EDCD.GPL_PRICE,
EDCD.EXTENDED_GPL_PRICE,
EDCD.OLD_PRICE,
EDCD.NEW_PRICE,
EDCD.REPORTED_UNIT_REBATE,
EDCD.REPORTED_EXTENDED_REBATE,
EDCD.ELIGIBLE_UNIT_REBATE,
EDCD.ELIGIBLE_EXTENDED_REBATE,
EDCD.PRICE_CHANGE_DATE,
EDCD.DATE_OF_SUBMISSION,
EDCD.RESELLER_NAME,
EDCD.RESELLER_COUNTRY_CODE,
EDCD.RESELLER_ADDRESS1,
EDCD.RESELLER_ADDRESS2,
EDCD.RESELLER_CITY,
EDCD.RESELLER_STATE,
EDCD.RESELLER_ZIP_CODE,
EDCD.RESELLER_PHONE,
EDCD.RESELLER_ACCOUNT_NO,
EDCD.RESELLER_CERTIFIED,
EDCD.RESELLER_CERTIFICATION_LEVEL,
EDCD.ENDUSER_NAME,
EDCD.ENDUSER_COUNTRY_CODE,
EDCD.ENDUSER_ADDRESS1,
EDCD.ENDUSER_ADDRESS2,
EDCD.ENDUSER_CITY,
EDCD.ENDUSER_STATE,
EDCD.ENDUSER_ZIP_CODE,
EDCD.ENDUSER_PHONE,
EDCD.INVOICE_NUMBER,
EDCD.PO_NUMBER,
EDCD.TRADEIN_QUOTE_NUMBER,
EDCD.DISTI_DEBIT_MEMO_NUMBER,
EDCD.MARKET_TYPE,
EDCD.VALIDATION_REASON_CODE,
EDCD.CORRECTION_ACTION,
EDCD.COMMENTS,
EDCD.CLAIM_DETAIL_STATUS,
EDCD.ACTIVE_FLAG,
EDCD.CREATED_BY,
EDCD.CREATED_DATE,
EDCD.UPDATED_BY,
EDCD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
EDCD.REPORTED_UNIT_REBATE_LC,
EDCD.REPORTED_EXTENDED_REBATE_LC,
EDCD.ELIGIBLE_UNIT_REBATE_LC,
EDCD.ELIGIBLE_EXTENDED_REBATE_LC,
EDCD.WPL_PRICE_LC,
EDCD.GPL_PRICE_LC,
EDCD.DCA_CONVERSION_RATE,
EDCD.OLD_PRICE_LC,
EDCD.NEW_PRICE_LC,
EDCD.DERIVED_PART_NUMBER,
EDCD.GST_AMOUNT,
EDCD.GST_AMOUNT_LC,
EDCD.MEMO_CREATED_DATE,
EDCD.REVISION_NUMBER,
EDCD.ATTRIBUTE1,
EDCD.MEMO_NUMBER,
EDCD.MEMO_AMT,
EDCD.ELIGIBLE_VARIANCE_UNIT_REBATE,
EDCD.SRC_VARIANCE ,
EDCD.SHORT_PAY_REASON,
EDCD.BATCH_ID,
EDCD.ACTION_CD,
EDCD.CREATE_DATETIME,
EDCD.LOG_SOURCE_FLG,
EDCD.EXTERNAL_REF_ID,
EDCD.DATE_OF_SALE,
EDCD.DERIVED_PART_NUM,
EDCD.GL_ACCOUNT_NO,  /* ADDED AS PART OF March2014 Release */
EDCD.SAVE_FORCE_TEXT,  /* ADDED AS PART OF March2014 Release */
EDCD.POS_PDB_BE_ID, /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
EDCD.POS_PDB_BEGEO_ID, /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
EDCD.PROMO_PDB_BE_ID, /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
EDCD.PROMO_PDB_BEGEO_ID /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_DCA_CLAIM_DETAILS EDCD
WHERE EDCD.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'

SELECT 
SDCD.CLAIM_ID,
SDCD.CLAIM_DETAIL_ID,
SDCD.POS_TRANS_ID,
SDCD.POS_TRANS_TYPE,
SDCD.PROMO_NUMBER,
SDCD.MFG_PART_NUM,
SDCD.VENDOR_PART_NUM,
SDCD.REPORTED_ELIGIBLE_QTY,
SDCD.ELIGIBLE_QTY,
SDCD.TOTAL_REPORTED_QTY,
SDCD.REPORTED_WPL_PRICE,
SDCD.WPL_PRICE,
SDCD.EXTENDED_WPL_PRICE,
SDCD.REPORTED_GPL_PRICE,
SDCD.GPL_PRICE,
SDCD.EXTENDED_GPL_PRICE,
SDCD.OLD_PRICE,
SDCD.NEW_PRICE,
SDCD.REPORTED_UNIT_REBATE,
SDCD.REPORTED_EXTENDED_REBATE,
SDCD.ELIGIBLE_UNIT_REBATE,
SDCD.ELIGIBLE_EXTENDED_REBATE,
SDCD.PRICE_CHANGE_DATE,
SDCD.DATE_OF_SUBMISSION,
SDCD.RESELLER_NAME,
SDCD.RESELLER_COUNTRY_CODE,
SDCD.RESELLER_ADDRESS1,
SDCD.RESELLER_ADDRESS2,
SDCD.RESELLER_CITY,
SDCD.RESELLER_STATE,
SDCD.RESELLER_ZIP_CODE,
SDCD.RESELLER_PHONE,
SDCD.RESELLER_ACCOUNT_NO,
SDCD.RESELLER_CERTIFIED,
SDCD.RESELLER_CERTIFICATION_LEVEL,
SDCD.ENDUSER_NAME,
SDCD.ENDUSER_COUNTRY_CODE,
SDCD.ENDUSER_ADDRESS1,
SDCD.ENDUSER_ADDRESS2,
SDCD.ENDUSER_CITY,
SDCD.ENDUSER_STATE,
SDCD.ENDUSER_ZIP_CODE,
SDCD.ENDUSER_PHONE,
SDCD.INVOICE_NUMBER,
SDCD.PO_NUMBER,
SDCD.TRADEIN_QUOTE_NUMBER,
SDCD.DISTI_DEBIT_MEMO_NUMBER,
SDCD.MARKET_TYPE,
SDCD.VALIDATION_REASON_CODE,
SDCD.CORRECTION_ACTION,
SDCD.COMMENTS,
SDCD.CLAIM_DETAIL_STATUS,
SDCD.ACTIVE_FLAG,
SDCD.CREATED_BY,
SDCD.CREATED_DATE,
SDCD.UPDATED_BY,
SDCD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SDCD.REPORTED_UNIT_REBATE_LC,
SDCD.REPORTED_EXTENDED_REBATE_LC,
SDCD.ELIGIBLE_UNIT_REBATE_LC,
SDCD.ELIGIBLE_EXTENDED_REBATE_LC,
SDCD.WPL_PRICE_LC,
SDCD.GPL_PRICE_LC,
SDCD.DCA_CONVERSION_RATE,
SDCD.OLD_PRICE_LC,
SDCD.NEW_PRICE_LC,
SDCD.DERIVED_PART_NUMBER,
SDCD.GST_AMOUNT,
SDCD.GST_AMOUNT_LC,
SDCD.MEMO_CREATED_DATE,
SDCD.REVISION_NUMBER,
SDCD.ATTRIBUTE1,
SDCD.MEMO_NUMBER,
SDCD.MEMO_AMT,

SDCD.PROMO_PDB_BEGEO_ID /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
FROM $$STGDB.ST_DCA_CLAIM_DETAILS_INT SDCD
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT  NP_DRVD
WHERE SDCD.DERIVED_PART_NUMBER=NP_DRVD.BK_PRODUCT_ID)
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_DCA_CLAIM_DETAILS EXDCD
WHERE SDCD.CLAIM_ID    =EXDCD.CLAIM_ID
AND SDCD.CLAIM_DETAIL_ID = EXDCD.CLAIM_DETAIL_ID)

	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DC_CODE_DESCRIPTION NDCD_CDS,
	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DISTRIBUTOR_CLAIM NDC,
